response.justification: Bogdan Szabo has extensive experience in software development, including C++ and SQL, but his background is heavily skewed toward web, mobile, and embedded systems rather than capital markets or fixed-income systems. While he has worked with C++ (e.g., LabWindows/CVI at National Instruments), his recent work has focused on TypeScript, Node.js, and Dlang, with limited exposure to the financial domain or Windows-based capital markets systems. His domain expertise does not align with the mandatory requirements for fixed-income or investment banking systems.
strengths: 8+ years of professional C++ development experience, including low-level and Windows-based systems (National Instruments)
Strong SQL experience with multiple database systems (MongoDB, MySQL)
Demonstrated ability to work in financial-services-adjacent roles (e.g., RIDE Capital for investment practices in Germany)
concerns: Limited or no direct experience in fixed-income, capital markets, or investment banking systems
Recent work heavily focused on web/mobile stacks (TypeScript, Node.js) rather than C++ or financial domains
No mention of Summit platform, Kafka/MQ, or CI/CD pipeline knowledge, which are desirable for this role

key_factors.factor: Recent C++ and financial domain alignment
